example.comment-colors: Print each letter with a different color

about.cta: If you like Fri3d-IDE, please give it a GitHub star ⭐ and spread the word on social media 📢
about.report-bug: You can also report a bug 🐞

welcome.title: Welcome to Fri3d-IDE! 👋
welcome.text: Hi there! I'm your Fri3d guide. Let me give you a quick tour so you can start coding right away!

toolbar.title: Main Toolbar
toolbar.text: This is your main toolbar. Save files, run your code on the badge, and connect to your Fri3d device from here.

connect.title: Connect via USB
connect.text: Click this button to connect your Fri3d badge via USB/Serial. You can also use Bluetooth 🦷 or WebREPL 🌐!

side-menu.title: Side Menu
side-menu.text: This panel has tabs for the File Manager, Package Manager, Tools, Settings, and About. Everything you need!

files.title: File Manager
files.text: Browse and manage files on your connected badge here. Connect a device first to see and edit its files!

editor.title: Code Editor
editor.text: Write your MicroPython code here! Syntax highlighting, auto-complete, and linting are all built in. 🐍

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.text: The terminal shows output from your badge. You can also type commands directly into the REPL when connected.

done.title: You're all set! 🚀
done.text: That's the tour! Connect your Fri3d badge and start building amazing things. Happy coding!
